title: Come Down
content:
Still am I haunting
        Thy door with my prayers;
    Still they are panting
        Up thy steep stairs!
    Wouldst thou not rather
        Come down to my heart,
    And there, O my Father,
        Be what thou art?
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Come Down"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
